parameters.query:
SELECT id, platform, source_kind, name, url, account_handle, external_id, is_public, is_active, trust_score, discovery_method, notes, last_checked_at
FROM sources
WHERE is_active = true
  AND url IS NOT NULL
  AND lower(COALESCE(platform, 'website')) IN ('website', 'web')
ORDER BY trust_score DESC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO raw_ingest_items (
  id,
  source_id,
  entity_guess,
  platform,
  source_url,
  external_id,
  raw_title,
  raw_text,
  raw_datetime_text,
  raw_location_text,
  raw_image_url,
  raw_payload_json,
  language_hint,
  city_guess,
  country_code,
  status,
  error_message,
  processed_at,
  ingested_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid()::text,
  {{ $json.source_id ? "'" + $json.source_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.entity_guess || 'UNKNOWN').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.platform || 'website').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.source_url ? "'" + $json.source_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.external_id ? "'" + $json.external_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.raw_title ? "'" + $json.raw_title.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.raw_text ? "'" + $json.raw_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NULL,
  NULL,
  NULL,
  '{{ $json.raw_payload_json.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.language_hint ? "'" + $json.language_hint.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NULL,
  'DE',
  '{{ ($json.status || 'PENDING').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + $json.error_message.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NULL,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, source_id, source_url, raw_title, status, error_message, ingested_at;

UPDATE sources
SET platform = CASE WHEN platform = 'web' THEN 'website' ELSE platform END,
    last_checked_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.source_id ? "'" + $json.source_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }};

SELECT id, source_id, platform, source_url, raw_title, status, error_message, ingested_at
FROM raw_ingest_items
ORDER BY ingested_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
